features.autoEnrollText: Participants without an existing affirmative election shall be subject to the automatic enrollment provisions of the Plan.

features.vestingText: The profit sharing contributions under the Plan follow a 2-6 year graded vesting schedule, where participants gradually vest in 20% increments each year starting from the second year of service, reaching 100% vesting after six years.
features.afterTaxText: Participants also may designate all or a portion of their deferral contributions as after-tax contributions into a Roth account.
features.autoEnrollText: Automatically enrolled participants have their deferral rate set at 7 percent of eligible compensation and their contributions invested in a designated balanced fund until changed by the participant.

features.matchText: Effective January 1, 2022, the Plan was amended to provide for a Company safe harbor matching contribution equal to 100% of the first 3% of compensation contributed by the participant plus 50% of compensation contributed between 3% and 5%.
features.vestingText: Vesting in other Company contribution accounts was based on years of continuous service, with participants becoming 100% vested after five years of credited service.
features.rothText: Contributions – Upon meeting eligibility requirements as defined in the Plan Agreement, participants of the Plan were permitted to make pre-tax and after-tax Roth contributions to the Plan up to 100% of their annual eligible compensation.
features.autoEnrollText: The Plan Agreement provided for automatic enrollment of eligible employees at a pre-tax deferral rate of 1% of eligible compensation, unless the participant affirmatively elected otherwise.
